sections.paragraph:
pr. subst. passing over, transition, an idea which is transferred to the cause (pr. the passing over of the cause to the effect), the price (for which any thing is transferred from one owner to another), purpose, object (prop. the passing to a thing which we desire to attain). With the prefix בְּ: בַּעֲבוּר becomes-

(A) a prep. signifying-

(1) propter, because of (compare Talmud בִּשְׁבִיל through the way of, i.e. because of, Germ. von wegen, wegen), Exo 13:8 1Sa 12:22. With suff. בַּעֲבוּרִי, בַּעֲבוּרֶךָ because of me, thee, etc., 1Sa 23:10 Gen 12:13, 16 Gen 12:16 18:26 .

(2) pro, for, used concerning the price for which any thing becomes another’s, Amo 2:6 8:6 .

(B) Conj.-

(1) because (compare A, 1), followed by a pret. Mic 2:10.

(2) that (of purpose and object, in order that), followed by a fut. Gen 27:4 Exo 9:14 and inf. 2Sa 10:3 fully בַּעֲבוּר אֲשֶׁר Gen 27:10 also לְבַעֲבוּר followed by an inf. 2Sa 14:20 17:14 (compare לְ conj. that.)

(3) while (pr. in the transit sc. of time), 2Sa 12:21.
